articles.summary: Most meeting transcribers are kind of... bad? Meeting bot awkardness, long lists of irrelevant bullet points, and you're left wishing you'd taken your own notes for context.

articles.title: Get 1 month free with code TLDR1MO
ANTHROPIC CLAIMS ITS NEW AI MODEL, MYTHOS, IS A CYBERSECURITY ‘RECKONING'
articles.summary: Anthropic claims its new Claude Mythos Preview model is too powerful to be released to the public. The model specializes in identifying security vulnerabilities in software. Anthropic is making the model available to more than 40 technology companies to use to find and patch security vulnerabilities in critical software programs. The move is aimed at raising awareness of AI threats and giving good actors a head start on the process of securing their code.

articles.title: INTEL PARTNERS WITH SPACEX, TESLA TO OPERATE NEW CHIP PLANT
articles.summary: Intel has partnered with SpaceX and Tesla to work on Elon Musk's Terafab project. Intel will design, fabricate, and package ultra-high-performance chips at scale. Terafab will make chips for use in Tesla's robotaxis and Optimus humanoid robots. It will also make chips optimized for use in space.

articles.title: INTEL IS GOING ALL-IN ON ADVANCED CHIP PACKAGING
ASTRONAUTS SET DISTANCE RECORD, REVEALING THE MOON AS A PLACE TO BE EXPLORED
articles.summary: The Orion spacecraft has performed well since its launch last week. The crew looped behind the Moon on Monday. They reached their closest point to the lunar surface at a distance of 4,067 miles at 7 PM EDT. The Artemis II mission reached its most distant point from Earth at a range of 252,756 miles, a new record for the farthest anyone has traveled into space.

articles.title: STARTING TODAY! LEARN HOW TO BRING AI TO YOUR DATA
articles.summary: Is fragmented data holding back AI? Instead of moving your data into separate AI environments, you can bring AI to your data to simplify your architecture.

S3 FILES AND THE CHANGING FACE OF S3
articles.summary: S3 Files lets developers mount any S3 bucket or prefix as a filesystem on an EC2 instance, container, or Lambda function. It is backed by EFS, which provides the tools developers already expect. From an application's perspective, S3 files is a mounted directory, but from S3's perspective, the data is objects in a bucket.

articles.title: THE BUILDING BLOCK ECONOMY
articles.summary: The current most effective way to build software and get massive adoption is to create building blocks that enable and encourage others to build quantity over quality. This will ultimately lead to better mainline software. Agents readily pick open and free software over closed and commercial. Closed-source, commercial software is at a massive disadvantage.

articles.title: GOOD TASTE THE ONLY REAL MOAT LEFT
articles.summary: Competent output is now cheap thanks to AI. This gives people who can tell what's generic, what's true, and what's worth pushing further an advantage. Taste is a side-effect of paying close attention to reality. Combine taste with context, constraints, and the willingness to build something different from the average.

articles.title: OPENAI #16: A HISTORY AND A PROPOSAL
articles.summary: Anthropic has partnered with several cybersecurity companies to fix zero-day exploits found by Claude Mythos. The New Yorker recently published a massive article about Sam Altman and his lack of trustworthiness. OpenAI recently proposed policy for the age of superintelligence. The company has purchased tech show TBPN, and while everyone vows that it will stay the same, that's unlikely to happen. This article gets into the details of each story.

articles.summary: Mechanical sympathy is the practice of creating software that is sympathetic to its underlying hardware.

articles.title: THE RIVIAN R2 WILL LAUNCH WITH 335 MILES OF RANGE
articles.summary: The official EPA range estimate for the R2 is 335 miles when fitted with 12-inch wheels, and 314 miles when fitted with 20-inch wheels.
